title: elymus campestris
intro: Elymus campestris, also known as wild ryegrass or June grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Elymus campestris include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Elymus campestris can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
